settings.hero_tagline: Quality products. Trusted brands. Real value for every retailer.
settings.story_text: Joon Distribution was founded with one goal — to make wholesale simple, reliable, and worth it for every retailer we serve. From premium vape hardware to lifestyle products, we carry the brands your customers want and deliver with speed and consistency you can count on.
settings.gallery_heading: A catalog built for modern retail
settings.value_1_text: Every product we carry meets industry regulations. We vet our brands so you can sell with confidence.
settings.value_2_text: Fast fulfillment, accurate orders, and transparent tracking — every single time.
settings.value_3_text: We grow when our retailers grow. Dedicated support and flexible terms built around your business.
settings.closing_quote: We do not just distribute products — we deliver the foundation for your business to thrive.
